tests.name: test_no_matches
test_detects_three_anagrams
tests.test_code:
candidates := ['gallery', 'ballerina', 'regally', 'clergy', 'largely', 'leading']
expected := ['gallery', 'regally', 'largely']
assert find_anagrams('allergy', candidates) == expected

tests.name: test_detects_anagrams_case_insensitively
tests.test_code:
candidates := ['cashregister', 'Carthorse', 'radishes']
expected := ['Carthorse']
assert find_anagrams('Orchestra', candidates) == expected

tests.name: test_different_characters_may_have_the_same_bytes
